title: Isabl Knowledge Tree (root)
summary: Top-level navigation for Isabl documentation and CLI libraries organized by user intent: onboarding, data management, applications & analyses, CLI commands, execution, API client helpers, configuration, and utilities/errors.

children.title: Documentation & Onboarding
children.summary: User-facing docs, quickstarts and reference pages that introduce Isabl, its data model, and common operational guides.

children.title: Overview & Quick Start
children.summary: High-level introductions to the Isabl platform and a short quick-start tutorial to get up and running.

children.title: Tutorials, Tips & Community
children.summary: Guides for contributors, practical tips and pointers to common CLI workflows and UX improvements.

children.title: Data & Import Reference
children.summary: Documentation focused on Isabl's data model and the principles and options for importing and retrieving data.

children.title: Operational & Reference Guides
children.summary: Operational topics such as automation with signals, maintenance, supported batch systems, settings and application development guidance.

children.title: Data Management & Import
children.summary: Tools and workflows for discovering, importing, registering and organizing raw and reference data in Isabl storage.

children.title: Import Engines & CLI wrappers
children.summary: Importer classes and the CLI wrappers that drive bulk and local import operations for experiments, BEDs and reference data.

children.title: Storage Management
children.summary: Compute and create storage directories, patch instance storage URLs, and register files into instance storage.

children.title: File Transfer & Linking
children.summary: Helpers to copy/move/symlink files and expose experiment or analysis outputs into project or delivery directories.

children.title: BED & Reference File Processing
children.summary: Prepare and register BED and other reference resources (sorting, bgzip, tabix) and commands to register technique-specific resources.

children.title: Validation & Path Matching
children.summary: Utilities for detecting supported raw file types, matching paths to experiments, ownership/readability checks, regex helpers and per-file annotation hooks.

children.title: Applications, Analyses & Merging
children.summary: Develop, validate and run metadata-driven applications; collect results; and merge/aggregate analyses at individual or project scope.

children.title: Developing Applications
children.summary: APIs and hooks application authors implement: lifecycle, result collection and CLI metadata helpers.

children.title: Interface & Lifecycle
children.summary: Core abstract class and lifecycle hooks to implement application behavior and dependency resolution.

children.title: Results & Artifacts
children.summary: Helpers to assemble analysis result dictionaries, discover files by pattern and combine dependency results for use at runtime or completion.

children.title: CLI & Metadata Helpers
children.summary: Convenience accessors for exposing applications as CLI commands and for retrieving application metadata like IDs, primary keys and assemblies.

children.title: Running Analyses & Submission
children.summary: Orchestration and submission paths for running analyses, including summary reporting and submission controls.

children.title: Execution & Submission
children.summary: Top-level runners and logic to create or fetch analyses, execute runs, and emit analytics for runs.

children.title: Job Scripts, Logs & Paths
children.summary: Helpers to build job scripts, compute log/error paths and construct scheduler-friendly job names and patching commands.

children.title: Merging & Aggregation
children.summary: Hooks and commands to merge multiple analyses into aggregated project- or individual-level analyses and to trigger merge jobs.

children.title: Validation Rules & Sample/Assay Checks
children.summary: A comprehensive set of validations that application authors and operators use to enforce input, sample pairing, assay, platform and species constraints.

children.title: Input & File Validations
children.summary: Checks that required files, reference indexes and raw inputs exist and match expected formats.

children.title: Sample Pairing & Roles
children.summary: Validators that enforce correct target/reference pairing, single-target constraints and normal/control assignments.

children.title: Assay, Platform & Species Checks
children.summary: Validators for experimental method compatibility, platform matching, species constraints and source material checks (PDX, DNA/RNA).

children.title: CLI Usage, Commands & Options
children.summary: Command-line entrypoints, common commands for data retrieval and analysis management, and option helpers for composing CLI behaviors.

children.title: Entry & Organization
children.summary: CLI entrypoint and organizational helpers that show and group available applications and commands.

children.title: Data Retrieval & Path Commands
children.summary: Commands to locate files, directories and metadata for experiments, analyses, references and storage locations.

children.title: Analysis Management Commands
children.summary: CLI commands to process, patch, merge and manage analysis lifecycle and statuses.

children.title: Signals & Automation (CLI)
children.summary: Commands and signal integration to trigger or rerun automated workflows from the CLI or web frontend.

children.title: CLI Helpers & Options
children.summary: Utility callbacks and option factories to help construct consistent CLI behaviors and discover application result keys.

children.title: Execution & Batch Systems
children.summary: Integration points for dispatching analysis jobs to local or cluster batch systems and guidance on supported schedulers.

children.title: Batch Systems Integrations
children.summary: Submission helpers and array submission utilities for supported schedulers (SLURM, LSF, SGE) including auxiliary helper jobs and throttling.

children.title: Local Execution
children.summary: Run analysis commands locally (serial execution) for testing or small-scale runs.

children.title: API Client & Resource Utilities
children.summary: HTTP helpers, authentication, resource CRUD operations, pagination helpers and lightweight client-side serialization wrappers for interacting with the Isabl REST API.

children.title: HTTP, Auth & Networking
children.summary: URL normalization, request wrappers, token management and retry logic to ensure reliable authenticated API calls.

children.title: Resource CRUD & Retrieval
children.summary: Convenience functions to fetch, list, count and mutate resources (instances, experiments, analyses, projects) and to retrieve aggregated trees of related data.

children.title: Pagination, Filters & Iteration
children.summary: Helpers to format filter params, iterate paginated endpoints and batch items for efficient retrieval.

children.title: Serialization & IsablDict Utilities
children.summary: Utilities that convert API responses and nested Python objects into IsablDict wrappers and provide custom dict-like accessors and representations.

children.title: Analysis Results & Status Helpers
children.summary: Server-side helpers for validating and patching analysis results and bulk status updates used by CLI and automation code.

children.title: Configuration, Settings & Deployment
children.summary: Settings management, dynamic import helpers and deployment guidance for production installs and runtime configuration.

children.title: Settings API & Persistence
children.summary: Classes and methods to manage persisted per-user JSON settings, system defaults and reading/writing settings with import resolution.

children.title: Dynamic Imports & Application Settings
children.summary: Helpers to resolve import strings, perform dynamic imports and build application-specific settings objects from defaults and configured values.

children.title: Admin & Runtime Accessors
children.summary: Convenience accessors for checking admin status and fetching current API username and client configuration.

children.title: Deployment Guides
children.summary: Production deployment guidance for installing the Isabl API and CLI and operational considerations for production systems.

children.title: Utilities, Validation & Errors
children.summary: General-purpose utilities, filesystem helpers, validators and the library's custom exception types for robust error handling.

children.title: Exceptions & Error Types
children.summary: Custom exception hierarchy used across the CLI and import machinery to signal validation, configuration and automation errors.

children.title: Filesystem & Transfer Utilities
children.summary: Helpers for directory creation, transfers, archive creation, linking and ownership/permission checks used by import and storage workflows.

children.title: CLI Helpers & Misc Utilities
children.summary: General helpers for CLI UX, traversal, decorator composition, analytics wrappers, searching files, and small debugging utilities.

children.title: Validators & CLI Callbacks
children.summary: Small validation utilities used for CLI argument validation: directory/file pattern checks and parsing sample pair TSVs.
